# seerr_radarr_server (Data Source)

Read a Seerr Radarr server configuration via /api/v1/settings/radarr.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "seerr_radarr_server" "movies" {
  server_id = 1
}

output "radarr_server_json" {
  value = data.seerr_radarr_server.movies.response_json
}
```



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `server_id` (Number) The numeric ID of the Radarr server to look up.

### Read-Only

- `response_json` (String) Raw JSON response body for the matched server.
- `status_code` (Number) HTTP status code.
